planner.pendingActionsReadyToSync: You can sync now to send pending changes to the server.

planner.depositAmountHint: Required for group plans to invite and pay. Maximum 50,000,000.
planner.groupDepositSectionHint: New members pay this deposit before joining the group.
planner.depositRequiredForGroup: Group plans need a deposit greater than 0.
planner.checkInConfirm: Do you want to check-in at {{siteName}}?
planner.checkInOfflineSaved: Check-in saved offline at {{siteName}}. Will sync when online.
planner.locationPermissionDenied: Cannot get your location. Please enable GPS and allow the app to access location.
planner.cannotAddItemCrossDay: Cannot add location because arrival time exceeds current day. Please add to another day.
planner.itemAddedOffline: Location added offline. Will sync when online.
planner.removePlaceConfirm: Do you want to remove this nearby place from the itinerary?
planner.waitingOtherMembers: Waiting for other members to join…
planner.manualLockMicrocopy: Finalizes the roster and itinerary. You cannot add stops or people after locking.
planner.inviteEmailHint: Invites are sent by email. To share a join link quickly, use the share button on each pending invite below.
planner.shareInvitePrefixGeneric: You're invited to join this pilgrimage plan:
planner.inviteLinkNoToken: No invite link is available for this invite yet.
planner.invitePaymentOpenedBody: Complete the deposit on PayOS. When you return to the app, your invite status will refresh.
planner.inviteJoinWalletBody: Deposit was taken from your wallet.
planner.inviteJoinSuccessBody: You are now on the plan.
planner.inviteDepositNotConfigured: This shared plan has no deposit amount set. Ask the owner to configure it in plan details before inviting others.
planner.invitePaymentLinkFailed: Could not create the payment link. Try again later or check wallet / PayOS configuration.
planner.inviteRespondFailed: Could not respond to the invite.
planner.startTripMessage: Switch this plan to in progress so members can check in along the route?
planner.completeTripMessage: Mark this plan as completed? You can still view history and statements.
planner.startTripCtaHint: Switch to in progress to enable check-ins.
planner.completeTripCtaHint: Finish the plan when the group is done.
planner.skipStopMessage: Mark this stop as skipped? The group can continue the itinerary.
planner.checkInNotAvailable: Check-in is available when the stop is in progress. Wait for the lead or follow the itinerary order.
planner.depositCancelHint: If you have a pending deposit for an invite (your email), you can cancel the link or reject the invite.
planner.depositCancelChoose: Cancel the link to pay later, or reject the invite permanently?
planner.depositReset: Payment link cancelled; you can try again
planner.depositCancelFailed: No pending deposit or action failed

wallet.transactionsLoadFailed: Could not load transaction history. Pull down to refresh.
